hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; bash '/Users/andrey/Documents/Claude Code/kovalov-tattoo/scripts/ensure-gtm.sh' "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
cd '/Users/andrey/Documents/Claude Code/kovalov-tattoo' && if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "Auto-commit: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push origin main; fi
